title: Amethyst Optimized
description: Pojavlauncher or Amethyst Launcher optimization Modpack for Android/iOS!
body:
# Amethyst Optimized

**Amethyst Optimized** is specifically made for the **Amethyst launcher**, but it will also work fine on desktop launchers or even on iOS. The idea behind this modpack was to bring together some of the best optimization mods that have been tested and proven to work within the **Amethyst**.

If you have experienced terrible frame rates with Minecraft in the past, then **Amethyst Optimized** is the modpack for you. There are no gameplay mechanics included in this modpack. It is meant to improve the performance of Minecraft for players on low-end or even mid-range phones.

![500 FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ol78gK3X/images/09c2725caec3e6099d3bbd4d8ccfa2b39629df97.jpeg)

This modpack is based on **Fabric**, so further mods can easily be added on top of this.

In case you are experiencing any issues with this modpack, support is available on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/j8GTQv3YvY) server for the modpack. Simply drop your issue on the Discord server, and someone will assist you.

**This modpack contains the following:**

- [BBE](https://modrinth.com/mod/ONZm0H7Y) by ceeden
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) by Thosea
- [Cloth Config v26\.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g) by shedaniel
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q) by RelativityMC, ishland
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) by juliand665, LostLuma
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) by tr7zw
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) by FabricMC
- [Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/ncKjyGm3) by DerpDerpling, UltimateBoomer \(Original Author\)
- [Fast Noise](https://modrinth.com/mod/OnlVIpq5) by ZenXArch
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) by malte0811
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) by RK\_01
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/uLbm7CG6) by Jerozgen
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) by JellySquid, 2No2Name
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) by Prospector, haykam821, gniftygnome, TerraformersMC
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/TjSm1wrD) by embeddedt
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/51shyZVL) by FX \- PR0CESS, 1Foxy2
- [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) by Patbox
- [Podium](https://modrinth.com/mod/fW8woQj4) by AndreasMelone
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) by FlashyReese
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ps1zyz6x) by Spottedleaf, ishland
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) by JellySquid \(jellysquid3\)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) by FlashyReese
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/wnEe9KBa) by ishland
